titleStmt.title: SII 15.51: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 51. (B.K. No. 108 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of the Śiva temple.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Yuva, Prathamāshāḍha pūrṇimā, Thursday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1155 A.D. June 16. As there were no two Āshāḍhas in the year cited, the Prathamāshāḍha mentioned in the record seems to refer to the first month of the Chāturmāsya, which commences from Āshāḍha.

It records that Hollagāvuṇḍa of Mōraka family, the Mahāprabhu of Hosavūr, made the gift of dasavanda income derived from a garden for feeding the ascetics. The gift was entrusted to Gaṅgarāśipaṇḍita, the āchārya of the Mūlasthāna temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaccāḷukyavaṁśōdayagiriśikharārūḍhanastākhiḷārisōmānaṁtāndhakāra
prakaṭitanijarāgōdayaṁ cārutējōdhāmaṁ bhūpāḷasū¨ryyaṁ jaladhivṛta
�rācakramaṁ sadguṇaprōddāmaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁ sale nile beḷagutti¨rddanutsāha dindaṁ .
svasti sakaḷaguṇamaṇivibhūṣaṇāḷaṁkṛtagātranuṁ sajanajavamitranuṁ śivadha¨rmmaramya
ha¨rmmyamāṇikyakaḷaṣanuṁ nijāśritavipadadrikuḷiśanuṁ haracaraṇanakhakiraṇakusuma
maṁjaripariraṁjitōttamāṁganuṁ śivakathāprasaṁganuṁ mōrakakuḷanabhasthaḷīgabhastimāḷi
yuṁ du¨rddamapratāpaśāliyumappa hollagāvuṇḍana guṇaprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . v® .
calavambhonidhigaṁbudoṭṭanacalaṁ cāgaṁ mukuṁdaṁge bhūtaḷamaṁ koṭṭana caugavaṇmu javanaṁ
geldi¨rddanaṇmeṁdaḍā¨rccaladoḷcāgedoḷaṇminōḷpore peṟanōḷvāgaḷeṁdī catu¨rjjaladhi vyāvṛta dhā
tti baṇnisutevikkuṁ hollagāvuṇḍanaṁ . © svastiyamaniyama svādhyāya dhyānadhāra
ṇa mōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ parōpakāra cārucaritanirataruṁ nijāśri
tajanakumudinīsudhārōcigaḷuvidānīṁtanadadhīcigaḷuṁ vaṁdijanakaḷpabhūjaruṁ saṁta¨rppi
ta kavisamājamananisi mattaṁ . ka . Aṁgajamadamadananumāsaṁgaṁ vibhudhāśrayaṁ vṛṣa
dhvajanene lōkaṁ gaṁgarāśimunipaṁ gaṁgādharanaṁtiresadanī vasumatiyoḷ . v® . dayitaṁ vina
yavēṟitoḷpu daḷavēṟiltoppu nīrēṟitakṣayapuṇyaṁ . poreyēṟitu karaṁ biṇpēṟita
tyujvalōdgayaśaṁ līleyineydi diggajamanēṟitteṁdaḍiṁtopparoḷu yathā¨rtthanene gaṁga
rāśimuniyaṁ gāṁbhī¨ryyavārāśiyaṁ . piriduṁ niṁnnane nacci dala jjō
daṁdīvude bīḷpanuṁnatiyade mpallade maravaṭṭi bīḷva vadārendī gaṁgarāśi
bratīśvaranā kalpakujakudāraguṇamaṁ kalpippanellaṁdadiṁ . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya cakra
va¨rtti traiḷōkyamalladēvava¨rṣada 7 neya yuva saṁvatsarada prathamāṣāḍhada pu
ṇnami bṛhaspativāra sōmagrahaṇa vyatipātadaṁdu hosavūra mahā
prabhu hollagāvuṇḍaṁ śrī mūlasthāna dēvarācā¨ryyarappa gaṁgara śipaṇḍitadēva
ra kālaṁ ka¨rcci kaidhāreyaredu [A]lliya tapōdhanarāhārakeṁdoṁdu tōṁṭadāya dasava
ndamaṁ biṭṭanā tōṁṭada sthaḷaṁ kadaṁbageyyiṁ teṁka māḷēśvaradēvara tōṁṭadiṁdīśānya . © © ©
